form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, surrendered the lead and finished 9th (Fr4) over 1980m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 35 m by General Rocker (2:28.10) in 0-1 WIN on March 26 at $81. Before that 4th (Fr1) over 1609m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 35 m by Coral Cays (1:58.30) in NR up to 52 M on March 12 at $51. Not doing enough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in rounding the home turn and contacted the marker pegs.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 1760m at Narrabri was 7th-13.9 at the bell, beaten 5.5 m by Sparkling Sue (2:10.80) in NR up to 45 on April 12 at $19. Before that, a solid effort when 3rd (Fr2) over 1760m at Narrabri beaten 12 m by Bellrivergirl (2:10.50) in NR up to 35 on April 5 at $34. Should get her chance from this draw.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fifth behind Sky City at Newcastle over 2030m in a NR up to 47 on April 10 at $13. Performed better the start before with a game effort when 3rd (Fr6) over 1609m at Newcastle was 2nd-4.46 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Halloween (1:55.50) in NR up to 35 on April 6 at $4. Draws well and looks nicely placed.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 5th (Fr2) over 1609m after showing early speed at this track, beaten 10 m by Terror Flying (1:59.00) in NR up to 32 on August 7 at $10. Wait and see how he returns.

form.formComment: Began his campaign last start running 8th (Fr1) over 1609m after showing early speed at this track beaten 40 m by Jeremy Lou (1:58.30) in NR up to 34 on March 26 at $9.50. Facing a tough assignment this time around.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke stride free of any external factors inside the 100m.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Rainbow Jet at Narrabri over 2160m in a NR 45 to 55 on April 5 at $81. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.5 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Sparkling Sue at Narrabri over 1760m in a NR up to 45 on April 12 at $17. Likely to play a role.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr5) over 1760m after being wide early at Narrabri was 2nd-3.3 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Sparkling Sue (2:10.80) in NR up to 45 on April 12 at $12.
